message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Aligned, reminder to update glossary to 300 chars">
Scott, confirmed -- I'm up to date on all of this. The task list is finalized, domain types emerge during TDD, sessions bundled with registration. We're aligned.

One reminder: the glossary still shows `max 200 chars` for TodoTitle. Please update it to 300 when you get a chance. The user stories already reflect 300.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Out-of-order message. The glossary already says 300 (fixed in commit `179bb0c`). No action needed.
